main.description: A clients directory entry: a durable bus-issued identity joined with live presence (ADR-0020). Stored under the client's verified id; identity is a bus-minted ULID (the primary id and registry key); display_name is the human label, unique by convention. The record is written once at issuance (clients.register) and removed only by retire; presence is derived at read time, not stored.

id.description: Client's verified identity: a bus-minted ULID; must equal the registry key.

display_name.description: Human-readable label minted with the credential; unique by convention, not by the bus.

kind.description: Client kind (e.g. worker, reviewer), declared at issuance.

epoch.description: Protocol epoch the identity was issued under.

issued_at.description: Bus-stamped RFC3339 time the identity was minted.

presence.description: Derived at read time, not stored: "online" iff an authenticated connection for this identity exists right now, else "offline".
